content:
so i tried to draw my sona in morimens for a thing i was doing and i was making the design and accidentally made lore and changed her so much that she's just an oc now... 

she can clone herself and is based off of anything that can endlessly multiply. prion diseases, cancer cells, rabbits..  she was made to contain multitudes, yet treats her vast reflections like cancer cells, killing her other clones in the misguided belief that doing so will rid her of her less desirable qualities. 

and also she's unnamed. please help. i suck at naming characters. holy yap fest. sorry yall
